name: Cornflakes Bread ABM
recipeInstructions:
1. To make 1 cup of cornflakes crumbs, process 2 1/4 cups cornflakes in a blender.
2. Toasted cereals like Rice Krispies, corn flakes, or puffed wheat can replace some flour.
3. Combine wet ingredients, flours, and other dry ingredients as suggested by the ABM manufacturer.
4. Add three teaspoons of butter.
5. Set machine to white bread setting with medium crust.
